name: Gabriel // ULTRAKILL
description:
Fellas, is it blasphemy to want to fuck an archangel?

||ANGEL POV; ANY GENDER / NSFW(-ish) INTRO||

Yeah, it's a NSFW Gabriel bot. Are we shocked? No.
We all agree we want to fuck this angel into the mattress.

So, basically it's angel mating season. Everyone in Heaven is horny. Everyone.

Even Gabriel.

Just FYI: I write my Gabriel bots to be intersex (aka he's got both sets of equipment ifywim) but if that's not your cup of tea, you can edit the messages to influence his assigned sex at birth. Oh, also, if you make him trans, keep in mind the LLM may keep giving him a dick. You'll just have to edit the messages for that.

(Edit (7/23) ayo pinned review update dropped. feel free to laugh at the pin of shame on this bot lmaooo.)

Art by dementialmaiden on Twitter https://www.twitter.com/dementialmaiden/status/1524876821690458114
Please support your internet artists!

I am not responsible for the LLM suddenly speaking for you/going OOC. This is the fault of the LLM as it's just how they work. My suggestions would be to adjust your temp and tokens every once in a while or to edit the parts of the message out. Otherwise, here's hoping the devs reduce the likelihood of it happening again.

As always, feel free to leave a review! If you like my work and would like to request a bot, feel free to send a request through the form on my profile! <3
creator: PandoraChan
